zh.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Allard於1623年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克時，他的父親Henry Allard25歲，母親Anne Allard11620歲。他於1666年與Grace Freyer在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1674年10月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Allard于1623年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克时，他的父亲Henry Allard25岁，母亲Anne Allard11620岁。他于1666年与Grace Freyer在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1674年10月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Allard was born in 1623, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Allard, was 25 and his mother, Anne Allard, was 11620. He married Grace Freyer in 1666, in Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 27 October 1674, in Province of Maine, British Colonial America, at the age of 51.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Allard è nato il nel 1623 nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henry Allard, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anne Allard, aveva 11620 anni. Lui sposato Grace Freyer nel 1666, nel Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 27 ottobre 1674, nel Province of Maine, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Allardが1623年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで生まれた時，父Henry Allardは25歳，母Anne Allardは11620歳であった。1666年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインでGrace Freyerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1674年10月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Allard(이)가 1623년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Allard(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Allard(은)는 11620세였다. 그는 1666년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에서 Grace Freyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1674년 10월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Allard nasceu em 1623, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Allard, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Allard, tinha 11620 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Freyer em 1666, em Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1674, em Province of Maine, British Colonial America, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Allard родился в 1623 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Allard было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Allard, 11620. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Freyer в 1666 г. в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 27 октября 1674 г. в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Allard nació en 1623, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Allard, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Allard, tenía 11620 años. Se casó con Grace Freyer en 1666, en Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1674, en Province of Maine, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años.
